data.description: NASA ROCKET BLASTS OFF FROM FLORIDA FOR ARTEMIS II MISSION, SENDING FOUR ASTRONAUTS ON 10‑DAY FLIGHT AROUND THE MOON
NASA launches four astronauts on a lunar fly-around on the Artemis II mission in first crewed lunar voyage in more than half a century.

data.title: Kodiak Gas Services Announces Completion of Distributed Power Solutions Acquisition
data.description: A company based in The Woodlands, Texas, Kodiak Gas Services, Inc. (NYSE: KGS), disclosed the successful finalization of the acquisition of Distributed Power Solutions, LLC ("DPS"), a prominent supplier of comprehensive distributed power generation solutions. The purchase resulted in rebranding the acquired entity as Kodiak Power Solutions, now a segment of Kodiak Gas Services. This move significantly broadens Kodiak's operations from contract compression into the field of distributed power.
NASA: SRB boosters separated from Artemis II

data.title: Bithumb delaying IPO to post-2028, CFO cites enhanced accounting policies; IPO originally set for 2025.
data.description: The Chief Financial Officer of Bithumb has stated that the company is enhancing its accounting policies and internal controls in preparation for its initial public offering (IPO). The IPO plans, originally set for 2025, have been delayed.

data.title: Modern Ag Alliance Applauds Kentucky Enacting Critical Legislation to Protect Farmers' Access to Essential Crop Protection Tools
data.description: On April 1, 2026, in Omaha, Nebraska, the Kentucky General Assembly voted to override the Governor's veto of Senate Bill 199. This move makes Kentucky the third state in the country to pass this significant legislation aimed at safeguarding farmers' ability to use vital crop protection resources. data.title: Panitch Schwarze Secures Win for The Conard-Pyle Company in Trademark Dispute
data.description: In recent news, the Trademark Trial and Appeal Board has made a decision to dismiss an opposition made against the registration of a mark related to a horticulture product. The law firm Panitch Schwarze Belisario & Nadel LLP successfully achieved this dismissal, marking a significant outcome for their client, The Conard-Pyle. This development occurred in Philadelphia on April 1, 2026. The decision comes as a positive resolution for the parties involved and ensures the mark can proceed with the registration process without hindrance.
NASA: Ready to resume count and go for launch

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Stock Market Rallies Into Trump's Iran Speech; Tesla Set To Reclaim EV Crown
data.description: At 9 p.m. ET, President Donald Trump is scheduled to address the nation regarding the conflict with Iran. Tesla is expected to deliver its vehicles early Thursday. The stock market showed a rally leading up to Trump's speech, with Dow Jones Futures on the rise. Additionally, Tesla is poised to regain its position as the top electric vehicle manufacturer.

data.title: SmartStop to Ring Opening Bell at the New York Stock Exchange on April 2
data.description: LADERA RANCH, Calif.-- SmartStop is set to ring the opening bell at the New York Stock Exchange on April 2nd.
